projectDescription: A2UI (Agent-to-User Interface) is an open-source declarative UI protocol that lets AI agents generate rich, interactive, native-rendered interfaces across web and mobile platforms without executing arbitrary code.
keyFeatures: Declarative JSON protocol for agent-generated UIs — safe like data, expressive like code
Framework-agnostic: renderers for React, Angular, Lit (Web Components), and Flutter
Flat adjacency-list component model optimized for LLM streaming and incremental updates
Custom component catalogs — agents are restricted to client-approved component allowlists
Data binding via JSON Pointer paths separating UI structure from application state
Transport-agnostic: works over A2A Protocol, AG-UI (CopilotKit), WebSockets, SSE, and REST
Shared @a2ui/web_core library providing message processing, state management and data binding for all web renderers
Python and Kotlin agent SDKs with prompt generation, streaming parsing, and schema validation
publicApiSurface: MessageProcessor — processes A2UI JSONL message streams
A2uiRendererService — Angular service for message processing and reactive model
A2UI_RENDERER_CONFIG — Angular injection token for catalog and action handler config
<a2ui-surface> — Lit custom element that renders a surface
a2ui-v09-component-host — Angular component host for dynamic rendering
createSurface / updateComponents / updateDataModel / deleteSurface — v0.9 message types
surfaceUpdate / dataModelUpdate / beginRendering — v0.8 (legacy) message types
actionResponse — v1.0 message type for synchronous RPC
A2uiCatalog.render_as_llm_instructions() — Python SDK method to generate LLM system prompt
InferenceStrategy.generate_system_prompt() — Python SDK abstract interface for prompt assembly
